**[Badminton](/wiki/Badminton_at_the_South_Asian_Games "Badminton at the South Asian Games")** at the [2019 South Asian Games](/wiki/2019_South_Asian_Games "2019 South Asian Games") was held in [Badminton Covered Hall](/wiki/Pokhara_Rangasala "Pokhara Rangasala") in [Pokhara](/wiki/Pokhara "Pokhara"), [Nepal](/wiki/Nepal "Nepal") between 1 and 6 December 2019. The badminton programme in 2019 included men's and women's singles competitions; men's, women's and mixed doubles competitions along with men's and women's team events.[*[citation needed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")*] A total of 94 players from seven countries competed in the competition for 7 gold, 7 silver, and 14 bronze medals.[[1]](#cite_note-1)
